message:
Running command: 
sleep 30

ORPID=$(ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print $2}' | head -1)
echo "OpenROAD PID: $ORPID"
[ -n "$ORPID" ] && ps -p $ORPID -o cputime=,%cpu= 2>/dev/null && cat /proc/$ORPID/status 2>/dev/null | grep -E "(State|Threads)"

echo ""
echo "Pipe: $(wc -c < /tmp/drt3_pipe.log) bytes"
tail -5 /tmp/drt3_pipe.log | grep -v "^$"

RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
echo "Step 72 log: $(wc -l < $RUN_DIR/72-openroad-detailedrouting/openroad-detailedrouting.log) lines"
stat "$RUN_DIR/72-openroad-detailedrouting/openroad-detailedrouting.log" | grep Modify
grep -v "^$" "$RUN_DIR/72-openroad-detailedrouting/openroad-detailedrouting.log" | tail -5
